UNLAWFUL DETAINER MOTION 501, CROSS DEFENDANT'S BRIAN GERAGHTY DEMURRER TO CROSS COMPLAINT IS CONTINUED TO FEBRUARY 7, 2014. MOVING PARTY IS ORDERED TO COMPLY WITH SFLR 2.6C AND PROVIDE COURTESY COPY OF CROSS-COMPLAINT TO DEPARTMENT 501 NO LATER THAN JANUARY 17, 2014 WITH COVER LETTER REFLECTING NEW HEARING DATE. JUDGE RONALD E. QUIDACHAY, CLERK J. RUMSEY, NOT REPORTED.
MINI MINUTES FOR FEB-07-2014 09:30 AM FOR DEPT 501

UNLAWFUL DETAINER MOTION 501, CROSS DEFENDANT BRIAN GERAGHTY DEMURRER TO CROSS COMPLAINT IS OVERRULED. CROSS-COMPLAINT IS NOT BARRED BY LITIGATION PRIVILEGE. SEE NAVELLIER V SLETTER (2003) 106 CAL.APP.4TH 763 AND MOVING PARTY FAILED TO SHOW HOW APPLICATION OF THE PRIVILEGE UNDER THE CIRCUMSTANCES FURTHERS PUBLIC POLICY. 100 PARK LANE ASSOCIATES V. FELDMAN (2008) 160 CAL.APP.4TH 1467. A CAUSE OF ACTION FOR BREACH OF IMPLIED CONVENANT MAY BE PLED. ORDER IS SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE RONALD QUIDACHAY, CLERK: M. OLOPERNES, NOT REPORTED

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Dec-29-2014 Off Calendar

MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Oct-02-2014 Set For Case Management Conference On Jan-14-15 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT , Or In The Alternative, Summary Adjudication
Off Calendar Jul-21-2014 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Judge: Lillian K. Sing; Clerk: Jose Rios Merida; Reporter: Not Reported. (D501)

Appearances:
Robert DeVries, Esq. (415-238-0061), counsel for plaintiff/opposing party
Daniel P. Iannitelli, Esq. (415-324-8801), counsel for defendant/moving party

Court hears arguments from both sides. DEFENDANT JOSEPH SHALIZI's MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT is taken under submission. Both sides submit proposed written orders.

MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar May-20-2014 Continued To Oct-06-14 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT , Or In The Alternative, Summary Adjudication
Off Calendar Jun-13-2014 Continued To Jul-15-14 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 501
MINI MINUTES: No appearances, tentative ruling adopted as follows: DEFENDANT JOSEPH SHALIZI's MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT, Or In The Alternative, Summary Adjudication is Continued to July 15, 2014. Moving party is ordered to comply with SFLR 2.6B and provide courtesy copies of the moving papers to depart 501 no later than June 20, 2014 with a cover letter reflecting new hearing dates. The Court received opposition and reply papers. Judge: Lynn O'Malley Taylor, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported (D501)

DEMURRER TO CROSS COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Feb-07-2014 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Daniel P. Iannitelli, Esq. of Iannitelli Law Office, (415-324-8801), SPECIALLY APPEARING FOR Joseph Shalizi, Cross-complainant and opposing party.
No appearance by Cross-defendant and moving party, Brian Geraghty.

Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows: CROSS DEFENDANT BRIAN GERAGHTY DEMURRER TO CROSS COMPLAINT is OVERRULED. Cross-Complaint is not barred by litigation privilege. See Navellier v Sletter (2003) 106 Cal.App.4th 763 and moving party failed to show how application of the privilege under the circumstances furthers public policy. 100 Park Lane Associates v. Feldman (2008) 160 Cal.App.4th 1467. A cause of action for breach of implied convenant may be pled. Order is signed in open court. Judge Ronald Quidachay, Clerk: M. Olopernes, Not reported (D501)

DEMURRER TO CROSS COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Jan-07-2014 Continued To Feb-07-14 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 501
MINI MINUTES: No Appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows: CROSS DEFENDANT'S BRIAN GERAGHTY DEMURRER TO CROSS COMPLAINT is continued to February 7, 2014. Moving party is ordered to comply with SFLR 2.6C and provide courtesy copy of cross-complaint to department 501 no later than January 17, 2014 with cover letter reflecting new hearing date. Judge Ronald E. Quidachay, Clerk J. Rumsey, Not Reported. (501)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Dec-05-2013 Set For Trial On Jul-14-14 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206
